violations.description: Multiple 'Book' buttons exist on the page with identical text but different destinations. Screen reader users cannot distinguish between them. Each button needs a unique accessible name.
violations.reference_fix: <button class="book-btn" aria-label="Book flight to Paris, France">Book</button>

violations.description: Newsletter email input has no associated label element. Only placeholder text is used, which disappears on focus and is not announced by all screen readers.
violations.reference_fix:
<label for="newsletter-email" class="sr-only">Email address</label>
<input type="email" id="newsletter-email" placeholder="Enter your email">

page_description: A travel booking website with a search form, destination cards with 'Book' buttons, and a newsletter signup. Multiple identical 'Book' buttons lack unique accessible names, and the newsletter input has no label.
